zh.lifeSummary: 當Ferquhard Strathearn於1125年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾盧維時，他的父親Mael Isu Strathearn Earl of Strathearn26歲，母親Rosabel Strathearn35歲。他去世於1170年12月在英國蘇格蘭享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ferquhard Strathearn于1125年出生在英国苏格兰培爾盧維时，他的父亲Mael Isu Strathearn Earl of Strathearn26岁，母亲Rosabel Strathearn35岁。他去世于1170年12月在英国苏格兰享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Strathearn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Strathearn in Perthshire. The placename means ‘the valley of the river Earn’, from Gaelic srath ‘valley’ + the river name Earn.

en.lifeSummary: When Ferquhard Strathearn was born in 1125, in Ruthven, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Mael Isu Strathearn Earl of Strathearn, was 26 and his mother, Rosabel Strathearn, was 35. He died in December 1170, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ferquhard Strathearn est né en 1125, à Ruthven, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Mael Isu Strathearn Earl of Strathearn, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Rosabel Strathearn, avait 35 ans. Il est décédé en décembre 1170, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ferquhard Strathearn 1125 in Ruthven, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mael Isu Strathearn Earl of Strathearn 26 und seine Mutter Rosabel Strathearn 35. Er starb im Dezember 1170 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ferquhard Strathearn è nato il nel 1125 nel Ruthven, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Mael Isu Strathearn Earl of Strathearn, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Rosabel Strathearn, aveva 35 anni. Morì nel dicembre 1170, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ferquhard Strathearnが1125年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアルスベンで生まれた時，父Mael Isu Strathearn Earl of Strathearnは26歳，母Rosabel Strathearnは35歳であった。彼は1170年12月にイギリススコットランドで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ferquhard Strathearn(이)가 1125년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 루스븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mael Isu Strathearn Earl of Strathearn(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Rosabel Strathearn(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1170년 12월 영국 스코틀랜드에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ferquhard Strathearn nasceu em 1125, em Ruthven, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Mael Isu Strathearn Earl of Strathearn, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Rosabel Strathearn, tinha 35 anos. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1170, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ferquhard Strathearn родился в 1125 г. в местности рутвен, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Mael Isu Strathearn Earl of Strathearn было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Rosabel Strathearn, 35. Он умер декабрь 1170 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

sm.Between 1130 and 1170: mai le 1130 e o'o I le 1170

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ferquhard Strathearn nació en 1125, en Ruthven, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Mael Isu Strathearn Earl of Strathearn, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Rosabel Strathearn, tenía 35 años. Murió en diciembre de 1170, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
